title: Sizeable Creeper
description: Just a datapack that spawn creeper at different size
body:
Did you ever found base minecraft mobs repetive? If so Sizable Creeper is there for you! It break the monotony by making creeper spawn in seven different sizes, variating from 1 block to 3 blocks. 

Sizable Creeper not only change the size of creeper but also their explosion radius, so be careful when aproching big creepers!
